prestazioni: Engine swap to 1ZZ-FED (1.8L VVT-i) with a custom-built turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, HKS 264° camshafts, and a Tomei 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold for optimized spool and top-end power on 98 RON fuel

Full bolt-on internals upgrade including JE forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL race bearings, and a Tomei Type-M 76mm lightweight flywheel for high-RPM reliability under forced induction
Custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with individual cylinder tuning, AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 18-20 psi mapping on E85 blend fuel
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with Work Meister S1 3P 17x8.5 +35 wheels and 215/40R17 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires for aggressive stance and grip

Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired front bumper with integrated LED fog lights and a carbon fiber lip, combined with a TRD-style rear diffuser and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust tip for JDM aesthetic

Full interior overhaul featuring Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, Nardi Classic steering wheel, and a custom aluminum shift knob with a short-throw adapter for the 5-speed manual transmission swap
